pattern: CMOS logic inverter: complementary NMOS+PMOS sharing gate (in) and drain (out), PMOS to the high rail, NMOS to gnd
note: v2, regenerative: linear inverting transfer with gain g about the vhi/2 trip point, hard rail clamp, rout into the kept load C sets the propagation delay. g>1 regenerates logic levels through arbitrary chain depth (the old conductance-divider form had trip-point gain <1 and collapsed to mid-rail). Piecewise-linear -- no tanh -- so the solver strides between edges. t0=2e-7: gates live at ns scale, not the 1.5ms analog default.
